titleStmt.title: SII 9.85: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 85. (A.R. No. 228 of 1918.) ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE HARIHARASVAMI TEMPLE AT TELIGI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 952, Pramōdūta (= A.D. 1032), Uttarāyaṇasaṅkrānti. The date is not verifiable. It refers itself to the reign of the Chālukya king, Jagadēkamalla-Jayasiṅghadēva (II), and mentions his feudatory Jagadēkamalla-Noḻamba-Pallava-Permānaḍi as ruling over Noḻambavāḍi thirty-two thousand, Kadaṁbaḷike thousand, Kōgaḷi five-hundred, Ballakunde three-hundred, Kandiparavi seventy and Kariviḍi thirty. Kaṇṇimayya, the Ūroḍeya of Telagi, is stated to have made a gift of some wet land to Karigōḍa(gauḍa) in the presence of the god Saṅkharanārāyaṇadēva of Kūḍalūr.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśraya śṟīpṛthvīvallabha
mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara parama
bhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷaka cāḷukyābhara
ṇaṁ śrīmajjagadēkamalla jayasinghava
llabhana rājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhi salu
ttumire svasti samadhigatapañcama
hāśabda pallavānvaya śrīpṛthvī
vallabha pallavakuḷatiḷakanamōghavākya
kāṁcīpuravarēśvaraṁ śrimajjaga
dēkamallanoḻaṁbapallava permāna
ḍigaḷ noḻaṁbavāḍi mūvatticchāyiramuṁ
kadaṁbaḷike sāyiramuṁ kōgaḷiya
ynūṟuṁ ballakuṁde mūnūṟuṁ kaṁ
diparavi Eṟpattuṁ kariviḍi mūvattuṁ
pañcagrāmavanāḷuttamire svasti
sakavarṣa 952 neya pramōdhō
tasaṁvatsarada Uttarāyaṇasaṁ
krāntiyandu kūḍalūra sankharanārāyaṇadē
vara sannidhiyali bikkeganeḷpattaroḷagaṇagrahāra
telagiyūroḍeya kaṇnimayyaṁ bikkiganake
ṟeya karigōḍaṁge vondu mattarggaḻdeya śrī
noḷaṁbādhirāja kālaṁ karcci dhārāpū
candrasthāi māḍibiṭṭaṁ Īdharmmava
bāṇarāsiyalsāira kavileya
muma koṁda pātakaṁ Ī dharmmava pratipā
ḷisidargge Ī kṣētradal sāyira kavileya
dānaṁgoṭṭa phalaṁ . ślōka .
bahubhirvasudhā datta rājabhissagarādibhiḥ
yasya yasya yadā bhūmi tasya tasya tadā
sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnṛpāṇāṁ kā
pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ

sarvvānētān™ bhāvinaḥ pārtthimēṁdrān™ bhūyō bhū
yō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ . svadettaṁ parada
ttaṁ vā yō harēti vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭhivarṣasa
hasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ ©
pattu māttaru sindapōjaṁge
tōṁṭada mattaralliṁ teṁkaliṁ koṭṭū
raṁ gavuNḍa Idanaḷi
sida konda phalamakku .
Digital edition of SII 9.85 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
